zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET於1383年12月8日出生在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Roger Corbet29歲，母親Margaret Erdington31歲。他於從1386年1月9日到1387年1月8日與Margaret Mallory結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他於1410年在英國史洛普爾被列為justice of the peace 。他去世於1440年8月12日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET于1383年12月8日出生在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特时，他的父亲Roger Corbet29岁，母亲Margaret Erdington31岁。他于从1386年1月9日到1387年1月8日与Margaret Mallory结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他于1410年在英国史洛普爾被列为justice of the peace 。他去世于1440年8月12日在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: CORBET
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Robert,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Reduced form of Old Norse Þorfriðr, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + friðr ‘peace’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Moreton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of the numerous places so called from Old English mōrtūn ‘settlement by or on a moor’. It is also widely used as a Jewish name, having been adopted as an approximate English equivalent of Moses .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET was born on 8 December 1383, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, his father, Roger Corbet, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Erdington, was 31. He married Margaret Mallory from 9 January 1386 to 8 January 1387. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. In 1410, his occupation is listed as justice of the peace  in Shropshire, England. He died on 12 August 1440, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET est né le 8 décembre 1383, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Corbet, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Erdington, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mallory du 9 janvier 1386 au 8 janvier 1387. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. En 1410, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace  à Shropshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 12 août 1440, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET am 8. Dezember 1383 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Corbet 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Erdington 31. Er hat von 9. Januar 1386 bis 8. Januar 1387 Margaret Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1410 ist sein Beruf als justice of the peace  in Shropshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. August 1440 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBETが1383年12月8日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた時，父Roger Corbetは29歳，母Margaret Erdingtonは31歳であった。から1386年1月9日まで1387年1月8日にMargaret Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。1410年，イギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はjustice of the peace と記録されている。彼は1440年8月12日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET(이)가 1383년 12월 8일 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Corbet(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Erdington(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1386년 1월 9일부터 1387년 1월 8일까지 Margaret Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1410년, 그의 직업은 영국 슈럽실르에서 justice of the peace 이었다. 그는 1440년 8월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1383, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Corbet, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Erdington, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mallory de 9 de janeiro de 1386 a 8 de janeiro de 1387. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Em 1410, sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace  em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1440, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET родился 8 декабря 1383 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Corbet было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Erdington, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mallory с 9 января 1386 по 8 января 1387. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1410 годуработал по профессии justice of the peace  в местности шропшир, Англия. Он умер 12 августа 1440 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET nació el 8 de diciembre de 1383, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Corbet, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Erdington, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Mallory desde 9 de enero de 1386 hasta 8 de enero de 1387. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. En 1410, su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace  en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1440, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
